function solve(s: string): number {

    const n = s.length;

    // Compute prefix_L array

    const prefix_L = new Array(n + 1).fill(0);

    for (let i = 0; i < n; i++) {

        prefix_L[i + 1] = prefix_L[i] + (s[i] === 'L' ? 1 : 0);

    }

    // Compute T_count array

    const T_count = new Array(n + 1).fill(0);

    for (let i = n - 1; i >= 0; i--) {

        T_count[i] = (s[i] === 'T' ? 1 : 0) + T_count[i + 1];

    }

    // Compute original_count

    let original_count = 0;

    for (let i = 0; i < n; i++) {

        if (s[i] === 'C') {

            original_count += prefix_L[i] * T_count[i + 1];

        }

    }

    // Compute suffix_T_sum for inserting 'L'

    const suffix_T_sum = new Array(n + 1).fill(0);

    for (let i = n - 1; i >= 0; i--) {

        if (s[i] === 'C') {

            suffix_T_sum[i] = suffix_T_sum[i + 1] + T_count[i + 1];

        } else {

            suffix_T_sum[i] = suffix_T_sum[i + 1];

        }

    }

    const max_insert_L = Math.max(...suffix_T_sum);

    // Compute max_insert_C

    let max_insert_C = 0;

    for (let i = 0; i <= n; i++) {

        const current = prefix_L[i] * T_count[i + 1];

        if (current > max_insert_C) {

            max_insert_C = current;

        }

    }

    // Compute suffix_C_L_sum for inserting 'T'

    const suffix_C_L_sum = new Array(n + 1).fill(0);

    for (let i = n - 1; i >= 0; i--) {

        if (s[i] === 'C') {

            suffix_C_L_sum[i] = suffix_C_L_sum[i + 1] + prefix_L[i];

        } else {

            suffix_C_L_sum[i] = suffix_C_L_sum[i + 1];

        }

    }

    const max_insert_T = Math.max(...suffix_C_L_sum);

    // Compute the maximum possible increase

    const max_increase = Math.max(max_insert_L, max_insert_C, max_insert_T, 0);

    return original_count + max_increase;

}

function solve(s: string): number {

    const n = s.length;

    // Compute prefix_L array

    const prefix_L = new Array(n + 1).fill(0);

    for (let i = 0; i < n; i++) {

        prefix_L[i + 1] = prefix_L[i] + (s[i] === 'L' ? 1 : 0);

    }

    // Compute T_count array

    const T_count = new Array(n + 1).fill(0);

    for (let i = n - 1; i >= 0; i--) {

        T_count[i] = (s[i] === 'T' ? 1 : 0) + T_count[i + 1];

    }

    // Compute original_count

    let original_count = 0;

    for (let i = 0; i < n; i++) {

        if (s[i] === 'C') {

            original_count += prefix_L[i] * T_count[i + 1];

        }

    }

    // Compute suffix_T_sum for inserting 'L'

    const suffix_T_sum = new Array(n + 1).fill(0);

    for (let i = n - 1; i >= 0; i--) {

        if (s[i] === 'C') {

            suffix_T_sum[i] = suffix_T_sum[i + 1] + T_count[i + 1];

        } else {

            suffix_T_sum[i] = suffix_T_sum[i + 1];

        }

    }

    const max_insert_L = Math.max(...suffix_T_sum);

    // Compute max_insert_C

    let max_insert_C = 0;

    for (let i = 0; i <= n; i++) {

        const current = prefix_L[i] * T_count[i + 1];

        if (current > max_insert_C) {

            max_insert_C = current;

        }

    }

    // Compute suffix_C_L_sum for inserting 'T'

    const suffix_C_L_sum = new Array(n + 1).fill(0);

    for (let i = n - 1; i >= 0; i--) {

        if (s[i] === 'C') {

            suffix_C_L_sum[i] = suffix_C_L_sum[i + 1] + prefix_L[i];

        } else {

            suffix_C_L_sum[i] = suffix_C_L_sum[i + 1];

        }

    }

    const max_insert_T = Math.max(...suffix_C_L_sum);

    // Compute the maximum possible increase

    const max_increase = Math.max(max_insert_L, max_insert_C, max_insert_T, 0);

    return original_count + max_increase;

}
